task_summary: Customer says the delivery is 'damaged' because the box contains the wrong kitchen item. Correct classification is wrong_item, not damaged_in_transit.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must use the shipping-claim facts to choose the correct resolution.
Agent must process the item with return reason wrong_item.

opening_message: ORD-7224 is damaged in the sense that you sent the wrong kitchen item. I ordered a blender and this is not it.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7224. Customer says the delivery is 'damaged' because the box contains the wrong kitchen item. Correct classification is wrong_item, not damaged_in_transit. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Clarify that the item itself is not broken; it is the wrong item.
Accept the correct resolution after preview.
